infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Too Good uses your camera for barcode scanning and food photo analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Too Good uses your photos to analyse food for calorie counting.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Too Good uses your location to show local weather on your dashboard.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Too Good uses your microphone for voice input in the AI chat.
